mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (name, gender, department, position, salary, entry_date, last_operation_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{department}, #{position}, #{salary}, #{entryDate}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET name = #{employee.name}, gender = #{employee.gender}, department = #{employee.department}, position = #{employee.position}, salary = #{employee.salary}, entry_date = #{employee.entryDate}, last_operation_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
